allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('data/reading.json'\)\); missing=[e['doi'] for e in data if not e.get\('title'\)]; print\(f'{len\(missing\)} entries missing title:'\); [print\(' ', d\) for d in missing[:10]]")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/reading.json'\); const m=d.filter\(e=>!e.title\); console.log\(m.length+' missing title'\); m.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(e=>console.log\(' ',e.doi\)\)")
